title: MANGA NGE zOMG
wikitext:
[]: [MANGA] [NGE] zOMG!             Quote Post by max3000 » Mon Mar 28, 2005 3:55 am We interup this forum to bring you this important service announcement: [URL=http://www.imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Mar 28, 2005 5:15 pm Posts annihilated. We'll have none of that . Any more low brow humor will be promptly baleted from this topic. Don't make me close this. Seriously. Cause I would like a good anti-Rei thread.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 28, 2005 5:39 pm Ok lets give this another try, seeing as the monkey was kind enought to not lock us. Why do you think Ritsuko was so hostile tword Rei jelous over gendos feeling tword her perhaps ? If so do you think her fears were grounded? Me I think that dispite the good doctors insistance that relations between men and women were illogical, she loved gendo. This is clear as day to any one watching the show. I think that she must have resented ( much like her mother did ) being in Yui's shadow, and projected that onto Rei. The thing that im sure will shock some people reading this is im not going to attack gendo now. I don't think she really had anthing to worry about, because I'm convinced Gendo cared for her, and wasn't robbing the cradel on the side.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Mar 28, 2005 6:08 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Cause I would like a good anti-Rei thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Mar 28, 2005 6:28 pm Dave wrote: Such a thing cannot exist within the confines of this world, nor without. Foolish Monkey! Rei is the alpha AND the omega.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Mar 28, 2005 6:30 pm Seen it, and it still holds more beauty than practically every other image created.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 28, 2005 6:38 pm COme on people i can feel the monkeys fuzzy hand on the lok button behave.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Mar 28, 2005 7:03 pm DatDude wrote: I don't think she really had anthing to worry about, because I'm convinced Gendo cared for her, and wasn't robbing the cradel on the side.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 28, 2005 7:17 pm First off While I didn't mind the I.D. card scene, there is such a thing as too much Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Mon Mar 28, 2005 9:10 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Posts annihilated. We'll have none of that . Any more low brow humor will be promptly baleted from this topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Mar 28, 2005 9:40 pm DatDude wrote: Next back on topic If Gendo felt nothing why did he take a moment to speak to DR akagi before shoting her? If he feel nothing why not kill her with out a word? In general I do think poorly of gendo but I do recognise his humanity, and ten years with some one your going to have feeling on way or another. It's not in human nature to have NO emotions.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Mar 28, 2005 9:53 pm I'd like to see that pic (if it's not the pink one with Rei hanging from the cross which I already have), as Rei is a beacon of diviness even when dismembered.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 28, 2005 10:14 pm The what do you think he said to her before he short her? I always thought its was " I truly cared for you. "

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 29, 2005 12:54 am Far too bland. This is the G-Man we're talking about. I don't think anything sappy came out of that man's mouth. Now THIS, on the other hand... Translated: "Akagi Ritsuko-kun. Truth to tell, you're just like that old hag."

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Mar 29, 2005 12:55 am What! How dare they doctor that photo and force Rei into that ugodly smile! HEATHENS!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 29, 2005 12:59 am Dave wrote: What! How dare they doctor that photo and force Rei into that ugodly smile! HEATHENS!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Mar 29, 2005 1:20 am For some reason that makes a sick kind of sence, and the smiling Rei is cool too. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 29, 2005 4:03 am DatDude wrote: For some reason that makes a sick kind of sence, and the smiling Rei is cool too. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Mar 29, 2005 2:23 pm DatDude wrote: The what do you think he said to her before he short her? I always thought its was " I truly cared for you. "

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Mar 29, 2005 4:23 pm Reichu wrote: Yeah, it's a pity she's not doing this in the actual show, otherwise we could be, like, 95% sure this is what Gendo actually said.
